name: Tormenta Negra
description: A dark, spicy rum and ginger beer cocktail finished with lime, bitters, and an orange wheel. Spanish for “Black Storm,” this is a twist on the classic rum and ginger beer cocktail with a more intense BACARDÍ Carta Negra profile.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice, and squeeze in the lime wedges.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum and ginger beer.
Add the bitters and stir gently before serving.
searchable_text: Tormenta Negra main rum BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum A dark, spicy rum and ginger beer cocktail finished with lime, bitters, and an orange wheel. Spanish for “Black Storm,” this is a twist on the classic rum and ginger beer cocktail with a more intense BACARDÍ Carta Negra profile. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum, 3 lime wedges, 3 dash Angostura® bitters, 100 ml ginger beer, as garnish orange wheel recipe steps Fill a highball glass with cubed ice, and squeeze in the lime wedges. Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum and ginger beer. Add the bitters and stir gently before serving. Garnish with an orange wheel.
